name: Mimo Web Search
description: Web search tool powered by Mimo Search API, providing real-time web search results for the agent.

token.description: API token for Mimo Search API authentication

apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the search API endpoint

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return

token.label: API Token
token.placeholder: Enter your Mimo Search API token

apiBaseUrl.label: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.help: Override the default search API endpoint if needed

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.help: Maximum number of web search results to return (1-20)
